query:
-- Sample Coach Profiles for Testing Booking Flow
-- Three diverse coaches with different availability, pricing, and specializations

-- Coach 1: GM Elena Petrov - High-rated, expensive, weekday mornings
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, userType, role, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('sample-coach-1', 'GM Elena Petrov', 'elena.petrov@example.com', 'coach', 'user', NOW(), NOW());

SET @coach1_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO coach_profiles (
  userId, 
  hourlyRateCents, 
  title, 
  fideRating,
  specialties,
  minAdvanceHours,
  maxAdvanceDays,
  bufferMinutes,
  lessonDurations,
  availabilitySchedule,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  @coach1_id,
  12000,
  'GM',
  2650,
  '["Openings", "Endgames", "Tournament Preparation"]',
  48,
  60,
  30,
  '[60, 90, 120]',
  '{"monday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}], "tuesday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}], "wednesday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}], "thursday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}], "friday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}]}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Coach 2: IM Carlos Rodriguez - Mid-range, flexible schedule
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, userType, role, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('sample-coach-2', 'IM Carlos Rodriguez', 'carlos.rodriguez@example.com', 'coach', 'user', NOW(), NOW());

SET @coach2_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO coach_profiles (
  userId,
  hourlyRateCents,
  title,
  fideRating,
  specialties,
  minAdvanceHours,
  maxAdvanceDays,
  bufferMinutes,
  lessonDurations,
  availabilitySchedule,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  @coach2_id,
  6500,
  'IM',
  2480,
  '["Tactics", "Middlegame Strategy", "Game Analysis"]',
  24,
  45,
  15,
  '[60, 90]',
  '{"monday": [{"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}, {"start": "19:00", "end": "21:00"}], "tuesday": [{"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}, {"start": "19:00", "end": "21:00"}], "wednesday": [{"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}], "thursday": [{"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}, {"start": "19:00", "end": "21:00"}], "friday": [{"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}], "saturday": [{"start": "10:00", "end": "14:00"}], "sunday": [{"start": "10:00", "end": "14:00"}]}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

-- Coach 3: FM Sarah Chen - Budget-friendly, evening/weekend availability
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, userType, role, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('sample-coach-3', 'FM Sarah Chen', 'sarah.chen@example.com', 'coach', 'user', NOW(), NOW());

SET @coach3_id = LAST_INSERT_ID();

INSERT INTO coach_profiles (
  userId,
  hourlyRateCents,
  title,
  fideRating,
  specialties,
  minAdvanceHours,
  maxAdvanceDays,
  bufferMinutes,
  lessonDurations,
  availabilitySchedule,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  @coach3_id,
  4500,
  'FM',
  2350,
  '["Beginner Friendly", "Chess Fundamentals", "Opening Repertoire"]',
  12,
  30,
  15,
  '[60]',
  '{"monday": [{"start": "18:00", "end": "21:00"}], "tuesday": [{"start": "18:00", "end": "21:00"}], "wednesday": [{"start": "18:00", "end": "21:00"}], "thursday": [{"start": "18:00", "end": "21:00"}], "friday": [{"start": "18:00", "end": "22:00"}], "saturday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}, {"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}], "sunday": [{"start": "09:00", "end": "12:00"}, {"start": "14:00", "end": "18:00"}]}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);

SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  cp.title,
  cp.fideRating,
  cp.hourlyRateCents / 100 as hourly_rate_dollars,
  cp.minAdvanceHours,
  cp.specialties
FROM users u
JOIN coach_profiles cp ON u.id = cp.userId
WHERE u.openId IN ('sample-coach-1', 'sample-coach-2', 'sample-coach-3')
ORDER BY cp.hourlyRateCents DESC;
